properties.name: MRT East-West Line (DKI segment)
properties.source_name: Jakarta Satu (DKI Jakarta) — DCKTRP Rencana Induk Transportasi Jakarta
properties.notes: Official Jakarta Satu (DKI DCKTRP) Transport Master Plan alignment. Indicative timeline: 2030 - 2034. Planned alignment — subject to change before construction; not animated. Shown as the DKI-Jakarta segment (Kalideres–Ujungmenteng); the ultimate East-West vision extends further (Balaraja–Cikarang) beyond the city boundary.
